title: MOT special notice 06-13: new brake imbalance standard change
body: "Special notices contain changes to the MOT scheme that aren’t yet in the MOT testing guide and inspection manuals.  This MOT special notice tells you about:   an amendment to the new standard for brake imbalance the Matters of Testing blog which provides official advice and information for the MOT industry   "

taxons.title: Car, motorcycle and van MOT tests
